query: What are the main differences between Python 3.11 and Python 3.12?

passages.title: What's New In Python 3.12
passages.text: Python 3.12 introduces a new type parameter syntax (PEP 695), improved error messages with better tracebacks, and approximately 5% speed improvement over 3.11. The deprecated distutils module is removed.

passages.title: What's New In Python 3.11
passages.text: Python 3.11 is 10-60% faster than Python 3.10 due to the Specializing Adaptive Interpreter. It adds exception groups (PEP 654) and ExceptionNote.

notes: must mention both versions and key features

query: What are the key new features in Python 3.13?

passages.title: What's New In Python 3.13
passages.text: Python 3.13 introduces: (1) free-threaded mode (PEP 703) removing the GIL experimentally, (2) a new interactive REPL with multi-line editing and color support, (3) an experimental JIT compiler, and (4) improved error messages.

passages.title: OpenAI announces GPT-5
passages.text: OpenAI announced GPT-5 on January 15, 2025, claiming significant improvements in reasoning and coding benchmarks.

passages.title: EU AI Act enforcement begins
passages.text: The European Union's AI Act enforcement provisions took effect this week, requiring AI developers to register high-risk systems.

passages.title: DeepMind releases AlphaFold 3
passages.text: Google DeepMind released AlphaFold 3 with improved protein structure prediction capabilities for drug discovery.
